hero_desc: Analyze crop maturity, detect plant health issues, and optimize harvest timing using smart real-time deep learning analytics.
tools_desc: Equip yourself with state-of-the-art AI analysis specifically tuned for cotton crop cycles and common health stressors.
growth_desc: Identify critical cotton growth stages from vegetative to harvest-ready with precision.
health_desc: Early detection of diseases and pests like Pink Bollworm before they impact your yield.
diagnostics_desc: Leverage deep learning models trained on thousands of cotton-specific agricultural images.
harvest_desc: Receive data-driven recommendations on the optimal window for cotton bursting and collection.
chat_welcome: Hello! I'm your Agri-Vision AI assistant. Ask me anything about cotton crops, farming practices, pests, or disease prevention.
footer_subtitle: Empowering cotton farmers with AI-driven insights.
